# Analog Devices

> Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) is a global semiconductor company that designs and manufactures analog, mixed-signal, and digital signal processing integrated circuits. This site presents ADI's products, software, and industry solutions, with a homepage feature on power system management (PSM) for 48V data centers.

Together with our customers, we co-create solutions across aerospace and defense, automotive, communications, consumer, energy, industrial automation, and healthcare.

## Main sections

- [Products](https://www.analog.com/en/product-category.html): Full catalog of amplifiers, converters, power management, RF and microwave, sensors, and processors.
- [Software](https://www.analog.com/en/software.html): Design tools, drivers, and development software.
- [AI](https://www.analog.com/en/ai.html): Edge AI and machine-learning enablement across ADI's portfolio.
- [Design Resources](https://www.analog.com/en/resources.html): Reference designs, technical documentation, and evaluation tools.
- [Solutions](https://www.analog.com/en/solutions.html): Industry solutions for the markets ADI serves.
- [About Us](https://www.analog.com/en/who-we-are.html): Company information, leadership, and values.
- [Careers](https://www.analog.com/en/careers.html): Open roles and life at ADI.
- [Support](https://www.analog.com/en/support.html): Technical support and customer service.
- [eShop](https://eshop.analog.com/en/app/home): Buy ADI parts and evaluation boards online.

## Industry solutions

- [Data Center](https://www.analog.com/en/solutions.html): Power system management, optical networking, and server equipment for hyperscale infrastructure.
- [Aerospace & Defense](https://www.analog.com/en/solutions.html): Space technology, avionics, radar, and secure military communications.
- [Automotive](https://www.analog.com/en/solutions.html): Electrification, in-cabin, and connectivity systems.
- [Healthcare](https://www.analog.com/en/solutions.html): Clinical and consumer health monitoring.

## Community and support

- [EngineerZone](https://ez.analog.com/): Technical support community and forums.
- [Analog Dialogue](https://www.analog.com/en/resources/analog-dialogue.html): ADI's technical journal.
- [ADI Developer Portal](https://developer.analog.com/): Developer tools and documentation.
- [Wiki](https://wiki.analog.com/): Community engineering wiki.
- [Contact Us](https://www.analog.com/en/contact-us.html): Reach ADI sales and support.
